case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JOSE L JUT CHOCHON

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHOCHON, JOSE L JUT $2,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,300.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
